TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sʉhlʉnganʉ,_Sulungan, title = Sʉhlʉnganʉ,_Sulungan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sʉhlʉnganʉ,_Sulungan} }

S.FORM: Sʉhlʉnganʉ, Sulungan Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan a niyaro', 41 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 108 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 88% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 95 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 12% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 13 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun69%, Rukai3%, Cou7%, Paiwan1%, Hla'alua6%, Seediq1%.
S.PHON: s*ħɾ*ŋan*, so~u~uɾo~u~uŋan itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u s*ħɾ*ŋan*/so~u~uɾo~u~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, ro~u~ukai*%, ʦo~uo~u~u*%, paiwan*%, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua*%, səəɬ~ɮi**%.
S.FORM: Sʉhlʉnganʉ, Sulungan Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan a niyaro', 41 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 108 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 88% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 95 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 12% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 13 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun69%, Rukai3%, Cou7%, Paiwan1%, Hla'alua6%, Seediq1%.
S.PHON: s*ħɾ*ŋan*, so~u~uɾo~u~uŋan itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u s*ħɾ*ŋan*/so~u~uɾo~u~uŋan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, ro~u~ukai*%, ʦo~uo~u~u*%, paiwan*%, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua*%, səəɬ~ɮi**%.
